get.description: Gets a nested list of all Home objects, including Sheets, Workspaces, Folders, Reports and Templates.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
A comma-separated list of optional elements to include in
the response. Valid list values: ownerInfo, source.

200.description: Returns Home object, populated according to the include parameter.

get.description: Searches all Sheets the User can access for the specified text.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text with which to perform the search.

200.description: Returns a SearchResult object containing a maximum of 100 SearchResultItems

get.description: Get the list of all Groups in an organization. To fetch the members of an individual group, use the getGroup operation.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to
100.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page to return. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

parameters.name: includeAll
parameters.description: If true, include all results (i.e. do not paginate).

200.description: Returns an IndexResult object containing an array of Group objects.

post.description: Creates a new Group

200.description: Returns a Result object, containing a Group object for the newly created Group.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:

100.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page to return. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

parameters.description: If true, include all results (i.e. do not paginate).

get.description: Gets a list of all the user's Favorite items.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to
100.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page to return. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

parameters.name: includeAll
parameters.description: If true, include all results (i.e. do not paginate).

200.description: Returns an IndexResult object containing an array of Favorite objects

post.description: Adds one or more items to the user's list of Favorite items. This operation supports both single-object and bulk semantics. If called with a single Favorite object, and that favorite already exists, error code 1129 will be returned. If called with an array of Favorite objects, any objects specified in the array that are already marked as favorites will be ignored and ommitted from the response.

requestBody.description: Array of one or more Favorite objects

200.description: Returns a Result object containing object(s) that were marked as favorites -- either a single Favorite object, or an array of Favorite objects, corresponding to what was specified in the request.

100.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page to return. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

parameters.description: If true, include all results (i.e. do not paginate).

get.description: Get the specified Sheet. Returns the Sheet, including Rows, and optionally populated with Discussion and Attachment objects.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
A comma-separated list of optional elements to include in
the response. Valid list values: attachments, discussions,
format, filters, ownerInfo, source.

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description:
Response will not include cells that have never contained
any data.

parameters.name: rowIds
parameters.description:
comma-separated list of Row IDs on which to filter the rows
included in the result.

parameters.name: rowNumbers
parameters.description:
comma-separated list of Row numbers on which to filter the
rows included in the result. Non-existent row numbers are
ignored.

parameters.name: columnIds
parameters.description:
comma-separated list of Column IDs. The response will
contain only the specified columns in the 'columns' array,
and individual rows' 'cells' array will only contain cells
in the specified columns.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to
100.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page to return. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

parameters.name: paperSize
parameters.description:
Applies to PDF only. One of: LETTER, LEGAL, WIDE, ARCHD, A4,
A3, A2, A1, A0

200.description: Returns a Result object, or a file.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to
100.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Which page to return. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

parameters.name: includeAll
parameters.description: If true, include all results (i.e. do not paginate).

rowNumber.description: Row number within the sheet (1-based - starts at 1).

version.description: Number that is incremented every time a sheet is modified.

filteredOut.description:
true if this row is filtered out by a column filter (and
thus is not displayed in the Smartsheet app), false if the
row is not filtered out. Only returned if the include query
string parameter contains filters.

inCriticalPath.description:
Only returned, with a value of true, if the sheet is a
project sheet with dependencies enabled and this row is in
the critical path.

locked.description:
Flag indicating whether the row is locked. In a response, a
value of true indicates that the row has been locked by the
sheet owner or the admin.

lockedForUser.description:
Flag indicating whether the row is locked for the requesting
user. This attribute may be present in a response, but
cannot be specified in a request.

expanded.description: Flag to indicate if the row is expanded or collapsed.

accessLevel.description: User's permission level on the Sheet that contains the Row.

format.description:
Format descriptor. Only returned if the include query string
parameter contains format and this row has a non-default
format applied.

conditionalFormat.description:
Format descriptor describing this row's conditional format.
Only returned if the include query string parameter contains
format and this row has a conditional format applied.

cells.description: Array of Cell objects belonging to the row.

discussions.description:
Array of Discussion objects. Only returned if the include
query string parameter contains discussions.

attachments.description:
Array of Attachment objects. Only returned if the include
query string parameter contains attachments.

columns.description:
Array of Column objects. Only returned if the Get Row
include query string parameter contains columns.

permalink.description:
URL that represents a direct link to the Row in Smartsheet.
Only returned if the include query string parameter contains
rowPermalink.

parentId.description:
In a response - the ID of the parent row (if any). In a
request - the ID of the desired parent row (used to specify
the location for a new or moved row).

siblingId.description:
In a response - the ID of the previous sibling row at the
same hierarchical level of this row (if any). In a request -
the ID of the desired sibling row (used to specify the
location for a new or moved row).

toTop.description:
Flag used to specify the location for a new or moved row.
This attribute can be specified in a request, but will never
be present in a response.

toBottom.description:
Flag used to specify the location for a new or moved row.
This attribute can be specified in a request, but will never
be present in a response.

above.description:
Flag used to specify the location for a new or moved row.
This attribute can be specified in a request, but will never
be present in a response.

admin.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a system admin (can
manage users and account)

licensedSheetCreator.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a licensed user (can
create and own sheets)

groupAdmin.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a group admin (can
create and edit groups)

resourceViewer.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a resource viewer (can
access resource views)

status.description:
User status, set to one of the following values: ACTIVE,
PENDING, DECLINED

columnId.description: The ID of the column that the cell is located in

columnType.description:
See type definition on the Column object. Only returned if
the include query string parameter contains columnType.

value.description:
A string, a number or a boolean value -- depending on the
cell type and the data in the cell.

displayValue.description:
Visual representation of cell contents, as presented to the
user in the UI.

formula.description: The formula for a cell, if set

hyperlink.description: A hyperlink to a URL, sheet, or report

linkInFromCell.description:
An inbound link from a cell in another sheet. This cell's
value mirrors the linked cell's value.

linksOutToCells.description:
An array of CellLink objects.  Zero or more outbound links
from this cell to cells in other sheets whose values mirror
this cell's value.

format.description:
The format descriptor. Only returned if the include query
string parameter contains format and this cell has a
non-default format applied.

conditionalFormat.description:
The format descriptor describing this cell's conditional
format. Only returned if the include query string parameter
contains format and this cell has a conditional format
applied.

strict.description:
Set to false to enable lenient parsing. Defaults to true.
This attribute can be specified in a request, but will never
be present in a response.

subject.description: The subject of the email. Optional.

message.description: The message of the email. Optional.

ccMe.description:
A flag to indicate whether or not to send a copy of the
email to the sender. Optional, defaults to false.

version.description: A number that is incremented every time a Sheet is modified

totalRowCount.description: The total number of rows in the Sheet

effectiveAttachmentOptions.description:
Array of enum strings indicating the allowable attachment
options for the current User and Sheet.

readOnly.description:
Returned only if the Sheet belongs to an expired trial
(value = 'true').

ganttEnabled.description: Flag to indicate that Gantt is enabled.

dependenciesEnabled.description: Flag to indicate that dependencies are enabled.

resourceManagementEnabled.description: Flag to indicate that resource management is enabled.

favorite.description:
Returned only if the User has marked this sheet as a
favorite in their Home tab (value = 'true').

showParentRowsForFilters.description:
Returned only if there are column filters on the Sheet.
Value = 'true' if 'show parent rows' is enabled for the
filters.

userSettings.description:
A SheetUserSettings object containing the current user's
sheet-specific settings.

owner.description: Email address of the Sheet owner.

ownerId.description: User ID of the Sheet owner.

permalink.description:
URL that represents a direct link to the Sheet in
Smartsheet.

source.description:
A Source object indicating the Sheet or Template from which
this sheet was created.

createdAt.description: Time that the Sheet was created.

modifiedAt.description: Time that the Sheet was modified.

discussions.description:
Array of Discussion objectsOnly returned if the include
query string parameter contains discussions.

attachments.description:
Array of Attachment objectsOnly returned if the include
query string parameter contains attachments.

fromId.description:
The ID of the Template from which to create the Sheet. This
attribute can be specified in a request, but will never be
present in a response.

errorCode.description: Error code specifying a particular error condition.

message.description:
Human-readable string describing the error condition
indicated.

id.description:
Share ID. NOTE: unlike other Smartsheet object ids, this id
is an alphanumeric string.

type.description: The type of this share. One of USER or GROUP.

userId.description: User ID if the share is a user share, else null.

groupId.description: Group ID if the share is a group share, else null.

email.description: User's email address for user shares; null for group shares.

name.description:
If a user share and user is also a contact, the user's full
name.  If a group share, the group's name.

accessLevel.description: User or group's access level on shared object.

subject.description:
The subject of the email that will optionally be sent to
notify the recipient. This attribute can be specified in a
request, but will never be present in a response.

message.description:
The message to be included in the body of the email that
will optionally be sent to the recipient. This attribute can
be specified in a request, but will never be present in a
response.

ccMe.description:
Flag to indicate whether or not to send a copy of the email
to the sharer of the sheet. This attribute can be specified
in a request, but will never be present in a response.

message.description: Message that indicates the outcome of the request.

result.description: Array containing one or more Objects that were created or updated (if applicable).

version.description:
New version of the Sheet (only available on select
operations)

Result.description:
Object returned for all `PUT` operations and `POST`
operations (and for some other operations).

id.description:
ID of the Sheet or Template from which the enclosing sheet
was created

primary.description:
Returned only if the column is the Primary Column (value =
true)

type.description:
One of: TEXT_NUMBER, DATE, DATETIME, CONTACT_LIST, CHECKBOX,
PICKLIST, DURATION, PREDECESSOR, ABSTRACT_DATETIME.

options.description: Array of the options available for the column

hidden.description: Flag indicating whether the column is hidden

symbol.description:
When applicable for CHECKBOX column type: STAR, FLAG. When
applicable for PICKLIST column type: HARVEY_BALLS, PRIORITY,
RYG, PRIORITY_HML, DECISION_SYMBOLS, DECISION_SHAPES, VCR,
RYGB, RYGG, WEATHER, PROGRESS, ARROWS_3_WAY, ARROWS_4_WAY,
ARROWS_5_WAY, DIRECTIONS_3_WAY, DIRECTIONS_4_WAY, SKI,
SIGNAL, STAR_RATING, HEARTS, MONEY, EFFORT, PAIN.

systemColumnType.description:
When applicable, one of: AUTO_NUMBER, MODIFIED_DATE,
MODIFIED_BY, CREATED_DATE, CREATED_BY.

tags.description:
Set of tags to indicate special columns. Each element in the
array will be set to one of the following values:
CALENDAR_START_DATE, CALENDAR_END_DATE, GANTT_START_DATE,
GANTT_END_DATE, GANTT_PERCENT_COMPLETE, GANTT_DISPLAY_LABEL,
GANTT_PREDECESSOR, GANTT_DURATION, GANTT_ASSIGNED_RESOURCE

width.description: Display width of the column in pixels

format.description:
The format descriptor. Only returned if the include query
string parameter contains format and this column has a
non-default format applied to it.

filter.description:
The filter applied to the column. Only returned if the
include query string parameter contains filters and this
column has a filter applied to it.

locked.description:
Flag indicating whether the column is locked. In a response,
a value of true indicates that the column has been locked by
the sheet owner or the admin.

lockedForUser.description:
Flag indicating whether the column is locked for the
requesting user. This attribute may be present in a
response, but cannot be specified in a request.

sourceSheets.description:
Array of Sheet objects (without rows), representing the
sheets that rows in the report originated from.  Only
included in the Get Report response if the include parameter
specifies 'sourceSheets'.

favorite.description:
Returned only if the user has marked the Folder as a
Favorite in their Home tab (value = 'true')

permalink.description:
URL that represents a direct link to the Folder in
Smartsheet

type.description: One of the following values: LIST, CUSTOM

excludeSelected.description:
If true, rows containing cells matching the 'values' or
'criteria' items are excluded instead of included.

values.description:
Only included if the filter is of type LIST. An array of
literal cell values that this filter will match against row
cells in this column.  The type of the objects in the array
depend on the type of the cell values selected to be
filtered on when the filter was created. These may be
strings, numbers, booleans, or dates.

criteria.description:
Only included if the filter is of type CUSTOM. An array of
Criteria objects specifying custom criteria against which to
match cell values.

createdBy.description:
User object containing name and email of the Comment's
author

objectId.description:
ID of the favorited item.  If type is 'template', only
private sheet-type template ID is allowed.

columnIds.description: IDs of the columns to be included.

includeAttachments.description:
A flag to indicate whether or not to include Attachments in
the email.

includeDiscussions.description:
A flag to indicate whether or not to include Discussions in
the email.

status.description:
One of the following values:OK: the link is in a good
state,BROKEN: the row or sheet linked to was
deleted,INACCESSIBLE: the sheet linked to cannot be viewed
by this user,Several other values indicating unusual error
conditions: NOT_SHARED, BLOCKED, CIRCULAR, INVALID, and
DISABLED.

sheetId.description: Sheet ID of the sheet that the linked cell belongs to

rowId.description: Row ID of the linked cell

columnId.description: Column ID of the linked cell

sheetName.description: Sheet name of the linked cell

operator.description:
One of the following values: EQUAL, NOT_EQUAL, GREATER_THAN,
LESS_THAN, CONTAINS, BETWEEN, TODAY, PAST, FUTURE,
LAST_N_DAYS, NEXT_N_DAYS, IS_BLANK, IS_NOT_BLANK, IS_NUMBER,
IS_NOT_NUMBER, IS_DATE, IS_NOT_DATE, IS_CHECKED,
IS_NOT_CHECKED

value1.description:
Optional. Present if a custom filter criteria's operator has
one or more arguments.

value2.description:
Optional.  Present if a custom filter criteria's operator
has two arguments.

sheetId.description: The ID of the Sheet from which the Row originates

favorite.description:
Returned only if the user has marked the Workspace as a
Favorite in their Home tab (value = 'true')

permalink.description:
URL that represents a direct link to the Workspace in
Smartsheet

email.description: The email address of an individual recipient. Optional.

groupId.description: The ID of a group recipient. Optional.

url.description:
When the hyperlink is a URL link, this property will contain
the URL value. When the hyperlink is a Sheet/Report link
(i.e. sheetId or reportId is non-null), this property will
contain the permalink to the Sheet or Report.

sheetId.description:
If non-null, this hyperlink is a link to the Sheet with this
ID.

reportId.description:
If non-null, this hyperlink is a link to the Report with
this ID.

supportedLocales.description:
Array of strings representing all Smartsheet-supported
locales.

formats.description:
Definition of format tables that are used in Column, Row,
and Cell format property.  For more information, see
Formatting.

urlExpiresInMillis.description: Attachment temporary URL time to live (files only)

attachmentType.description:
Attachment type (one of FILE, GOOGLE_DRIVE, LINK, BOX_COM,
DROPBOX, EVERNOTE, or EGNYTE)

attachmentSubType.description:
Attachment sub type, valid only for either GOOGLE_DRIVE
attachments or EGNYTE attachments:possible values for
GOOGLE_DRIVE attachments: DOCUMENT, SPREADSHEET,
PRESENTATION, PDF, DRAWING,possible values for EGNYTE
attachments: FOLDER

createdAt.description: A timestamp of when the attachment was originally added

createdBy.description:
User object containing name and email of the creator of this
attachment

parentType.description:
The type of object the attachment belongs to. One of
'SHEET', 'ROW', or 'COMMENT'

sizeInKb.description: The size of the file, if the attachmentType is FILE

format.description: One of the following values: PDF, PDF_GANTT, EXCEL.

virtualColumnId.description:
The virtual ID of the cell's column. This property refers to
the cell's parent column in the Report, while the columnId
property refers to the cell's parent column in its
originating source Sheet.

from.description: Row ID in the source sheet

to.description: Row ID in the destination sheet

parentId.description:
ID of the directly associated row or sheet: present only
when the direct association is not clear.

parentType.description:
'SHEET' or 'ROW': present only when the direct association
is not clear.

lastCommentedUser.description:
User object containing name and email of the author of the
most recent Comment.

createdBy.description:
User object containing name and email of the creator of the
Discussion.

readOnly.description: Flag to indicate if the User can modify the Discussion.

traits.description:
Platform-independent traits of the font family. One of the
following values: serif, sans-serif.

pageNumber.description:
The current page in the full result set that the data array
represents.

pageSize.description:
The number of items in a page. Omitted if there is no limite
to page size. Defaults to 100 on most endpoints.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages in the full result set.

totalCount.description: The total number of items in the full result set.

data.description:
An array of objects representing the current page of data in
the result set.

IndexResult.description:
Object returned for all `GET` operations against index
endpoints. This object provides metadata which can be used
to perform paging on potentially large data sets.

account.description:
Account object representing the current user's customer
account

admin.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a system admin (can
manage users and account)

licensedSheetCreator.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a licensed user (can
create and own sheets)

groupAdmin.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a group admin (can
create and edit groups)

resourceViewer.description:
Flag indicating whether the user is a resource viewer (can
access resource views)

status.description:
User status, set to one of the following values: ACTIVE,
PENDING, DECLINED

modifiedAt.description: The datetime for when the change was made to the cell

modifiedBy.description:
User object containing the name and email of the User that
made the change

readOnlyLiteEnabled.description:
If true, a lightweight version of the sheet is published
without row attachments or discussions.

readOnlyFullEnabled.description:
If true, a rich version of the sheet is published with the
ability to download row attachments and discussions.

readWriteEnabled.description:
If true, a rich version of the sheet is published with the
ability to edit cells and manage attachments and
discussions.

icalEnabled.description:
If true, a webcal will be available for the calendar in the
sheet.

virtualId.description: The virtual ID of this report column

sheetNameColumn.description:
Returned only for the special 'Sheet Name' report column
(value = 'true')

defaults.description:
A format descriptor where each element describes the formats
of the Smartsheet web application displays for format values
that have not been set.

fontFamily.description: Font families with additional font information.

verticalAlign.description:
Vertical alignment, possibile values: top, middle, bottom.
Note: 'default' is the default value, which is equivalent to
'top.'

color.description:
Color hex values. Note: 'none' is the default value for all
colors. Applications will need to handle this value and use
app-defined colors (typically this is Black for text color
and White for background color).

numberFormat.description: Possible values: none, NUMBER, CURRENCY, PERCENT.

rowIds.description: IDs of rows to be included.

paperSize.description:
One of the following values: LETTER, LEGAL, WIDE, ARCHD, A4,
A3, A2, A1, A0.

objectType.description: Search result object type (row, sheet, report, template, discussion, attachment)

parentObjectType.description: Search result parent object type (workspace, folder, sheet, report, template)

contextData.description: Additional info on search result context (row num...)

criticalPathEnabled.description:
Does this user have 'Show Critical Path' turned on for this
sheet?  Note this setting only has an effect on project
sheets with dependencies enabled.

destinationId.description:
ID of the destination container. Required if destinationType
is folder or workspace, must be null if destinationType is
home.

newName.description: Name of the newly created object.

ContainerDestination.description:
Object describing the destination container when a Sheet or
Folder is moved, or when a Sheet, Folder or Workspace is
copied.

rowIds.description: The IDs of the rows to move or copy from the source sheet

to.description:
A CopyOrMoveRowDestination object that identifies the
destination sheet

pagination-pageSize.name: pageSize
pagination-pageSize.description:
The maximum number of items to return per page. Defaults to
100.

pagination-page.name: page
pagination-page.description: Which page to return. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

pagination-includeAll.name: includeAll
pagination-includeAll.description: If true, include all results (i.e. do not paginate).

query-objectIds.name: objectIds
query-objectIds.description:
a comma-separated list of object IDs representing the items
to work on.

query-includeOwnerInfoSource.name: include
query-includeOwnerInfoSource.description:
A comma-separated list of optional elements to include in
the response. Valid list values: ownerInfo, source.

query-includeReportOptions.name: include
query-includeReportOptions.description:
A comma-separated list of optional elements to include in
the response. Valid list values: discussions, attachments,
format, sourceSheets.

query-includeCopySheetOptions.name: include
query-includeCopySheetOptions.description:
A comma-separated list of optional elements to include in
the response. Valid list values: data, attachments,
discussions, cellLinks, forms, all.

query-includeGetSheetOptions.name: include
query-includeGetSheetOptions.description:
A comma-separated list of optional elements to include in
the response. Valid list values: attachments, discussions,
format, filters, ownerInfo, source.

query-exclude.name: exclude
query-exclude.description:
Response will not include cells that have never contained
any data.

query-include-filters.name: include
query-include-filters.description:
When specified with a value of 'filters', response will
include the Filter the user has applied (if any).

query-rowIds.name: rowIds
query-rowIds.description:
comma-separated list of Row IDs on which to filter the rows
included in the result.

query-rowNumbers.name: rowNumbers
query-rowNumbers.description:
comma-separated list of Row numbers on which to filter the
rows included in the result. Non-existent row numbers are
ignored.

query-columnIds.name: columnIds
query-columnIds.description:
comma-separated list of Column IDs. The response will
contain only the specified columns in the 'columns' array,
and individual rows' 'cells' array will only contain cells
in the specified columns.

query-paperSize.name: paperSize
query-paperSize.description:
Applies to PDF only. One of: LETTER, LEGAL, WIDE, ARCHD, A4,
A3, A2, A1, A0

query-sendEmail.name: sendEmail
query-sendEmail.description:
Either true or false to indicate whether or not to notify
the user by email. Default is false.

query-query.name: query
query-query.description: Text with which to perform the search.

scopes.READ_SHEETS: Read all sheet data, including comments, attachements and cell data
scopes.WRITE_SHEETS: Insert and modify sheet data, including comments, attachments and cell data
scopes.SHARE_SHEETS: Share sheets, including sending sheets as attachments
scopes.READ_USERS: Retrieve users and groups for your Smartsheet organization
scopes.ADMIN_USERS: Add and remove users from your Smartsheet organization; create groups and manage membership
scopes.ADMIN_SHEETS: Modify sheet structure, including column definition, publish state, etc
scopes.ADMIN_WORKSPACES: Create and manage workspaces and folders, including sharing
